title: Zoro Faces the World’s Strongest Swordsman
description: On pages 13–16, Zoro confronts Dracule Mihawk, forcing his dream of becoming the world’s greatest swordsman into a brutal and public test.
scene: The Baratie battle pauses around a duel that dwarfs the immediate conflict: Zoro faces the gap between ambition and the world’s strongest swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Do you wish? For me to pierce your heart thus?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why do you refuse to step back?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Beats me... not really sure myself...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: but I get the feeling...

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: That if I were to take even one step back right now, I'd lose something very important to me... a promise or oath... or whatever it is would be irreversibly broken,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And that I'd never be able to return back to where I'm standing right now.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Yes,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: such is defeat.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Haha... then that's why I can't step back.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: even if it means your death...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'd much rather die.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What conviction he possesses!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: to rather choose death than defeat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: kid... tell me your name.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Roronoa Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I shall remember it,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: for your strength is not off seen in this world.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: and to pay my respect to you as a fellow swordsman,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I shall end this duel with my black sword, the world's strongest sword.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He unsheathed it!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That sword he used to cut our ship with!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So this is it... the final blow... If I miss here, I'll die...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: to be the world's strongest... or to die here and now...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: DIE!

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: Bro, that's enough! Stop!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Shutouryuu Ougi!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: (Three swords style secret)

summary: This part is a defining moment for Zoro, showing that his dream is real enough to risk death and that his loyalty to Luffy survives defeat.
